debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ centerOfMass (RigidBody.solidSphere d.succ m R) = 0

failed_attempts:
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, ← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply,
    integral_id_closedBall]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr]
  rw [integral_closedBall_id (0 : Space d.succ) R]
  simp

ext i
  simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, integral_coord_closedBall_eq_zero]

ext i
  simp [centerOfMass, positionIntegral, solidSphere]
  rw [← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply integrable_id_closedBall, integral_id_closedBall]
  simp

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere_mass m R hr]
  split_ifs <;> simp [solidSphere, integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero]

end RigidBody

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, positionFunctional]
  split_ifs <;> simp [integral_id_closedBall]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R]
  simp

ext i
  simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere_mass m R hr, solidSphere, LinearMap.coe_mk,
    AddHom.coe_mk, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, Pi.zero_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [mul_assoc, ← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply i (integrable_id_closedBall 0 R),
    integral_id_closedBall]
  simp
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr, integral_id_closedBall_zero]

have h : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, (x : Space d.succ) ∂volume = 0 := by
    have h1 : (volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall 0 R)).map (fun x => -x) =
        volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall 0 R) := by
      rw [Measure.map_neg_restrict, Metric.neg_closedBall, neg_zero]
    have h2 := integral_map continuous_neg.aemeasurable aeMeasurable_id (μ := volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall 0 R))
    rw [h1, integral_neg, eq_neg_self_iff] at h2
    exact h2
  simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, mass, solidSphere_mass m R hr, ← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply, h]

suffices ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, (x : Space d.succ) ∂volume = 0 by
    simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr, this]
  have h : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, (x : Space d.succ) ∂volume =
      ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, -x ∂volume := by
    nth_rw 1 [← integral_comp_neg (μ := volume)]
    simp [Metric.mem_closedBall, norm_neg]
  simpa [integral_neg, neg_eq_self_iff] using h

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, positionIntegral]
  simp [integral_id_closedBall]

simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, NNReal.val_eq_coe]
  have h : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, (x : Space d.succ) ∂volume = 0 := by
    have h1 := (measurePreserving_neg volume).set_integral_comp measurableEmbedding_neg
      (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R) (fun x => x)
    rw [Metric.neg_closedBall_zero, integral_neg] at h1
    exact eq_zero_of_neg_eq h1
  simp [h]
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, ρ_vec_apply, integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero 0 R]
  simp
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk]
  rw [MeasureTheory.integral_id_closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R]
  simp

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, mass, solidSphere_mass hr]
  split_ifs; · rfl
  ext i
  simp [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply (by fun_prop), integral_id_closedBall 0 R]
  simp

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero 0 R]
  simp
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, integral_closedBall_id]
simp [centerOfMass, ρ_vec, solidSphere, integral_id_closedBall_zero]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere_mass m R hr, solidSphere]
  split_ifs; · rfl
  ext i
  simp [← EuclideanSpace.integral_apply, integral_closedBall_id,
    continuous_id.integrableOn_compact (isCompact_closedBall 0 R)]
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr, integral_closedBall_id]
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, mass, solidSphere_mass hr, integral_closedBall_id]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, mass]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero 0 R]
  simp

apply EuclideanSpace.ext; intro i
  simp [centerOfMass, positionMoment, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  let B := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R
  have hB : map Neg.neg (volume.restrict B) = volume.restrict B := by
    rw [Measure.map_neg_restrict, Measure.map_neg_volume, Metric.closedBall_neg, neg_zero]
  have h : ∫ x in B, x i ∂volume = -∫ x in B, x i ∂volume := by
    rw [← integral_neg, ← hB, Measure.integral_map_neg]; simp
  simp [h]

simp [centerOfMass, linearCenterOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  apply integral_id_eq_zero_of_isSymmetric
  intro x
  simp [Metric.mem_closedBall]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall_eq_zero 0 R]
  simp

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass hr]
  rw [integral_id_closedBall_0_eq_zero R]
  simp

ext i
  simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr, LinearMap.coe_mk,
    AddHom.coe_mk, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk]
  have h : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, x i ∂volume = 0 := by
    let e := (Homeomorph.neg (Space d.succ)).toMeasurableEquiv
    have h1 : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, x i ∂volume = ∫ x in Metric.closedBall 0 R, (-x) i ∂volume := by
      rw [← Measure.integral_map_equiv e]
      simp [Measure.map_neg_eq_self, Metric.closedBall_neg]
    simp [integral_neg] at h1
    exact self_eq_neg.mp h1
  simp [h]

simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere]
  apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
  intro i _
  let B := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R
  have hf : IntegrableOn (fun x : Space d.succ => x i) B :=
    ContinuousOn.integrableOn_compact (isCompact_closedBall 0 R) (by fun_prop)
  have h := (volume_preserving_neg (0 : Space d.succ)).integral_comp (B.indicator (fun x => x i))
  simp only [← Set.indicator_preimage, Metric.preimage_neg_closedBall, neg_zero,
    Function.comp_apply, Pi.neg_apply] at h
  rw [integral_indicator measurableSet_closedBall,
    integral_indicator measurableSet_closedBall, integral_neg] at h
  · simp only [smul_eq_zero, mul_eq_zero, eq_zero_of_eq_neg h.symm, true_or, or_true]
  · exact hf
simp [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr, integral_closedBall_id_eq_zero]
